customData.b1-note: Legacy passive 'onRoundStart' grants +2 block pool. In the combat-system.md §2 continuity model, block pool tops to 6 between showdowns. Two modeling options for B2: (a) Terra starts with baseBlock=2 so effective pool is 8, (b) bulwark grants an instant effect that refunds +2 at each commit phase. Current hero blueprint uses (a) via `baseBlock: 2`.
customData.b2-note: OQ-35 resolved: reactive `trigger` prop removed. Item now resolves on dequeue as any other card/item. Item is effectively inert under §12 dequeue-only model given Terra's baseBlock already covers the +2 pool; kept as a named inventory slot so the hero's starter inventory descriptor still matches HVCD.
